data_quality: Rank positions verified for all 48 teams (1 April 2026 edition).
Exact points published only for the top 3 in accessible sources; points for 45 teams interpolated from verified rank along a typical FIFA points curve (see engine/build_ranking_raw.py).
Primary source: martj42/international_results dataset (community-maintained, widely used), complete through 2026-06-08; any match after that date is not covered.

Several results spot-verified against ESPN, US Soccer, Canada Soccer and Sports Mole (e.g. USA 2-1 Paraguay 2025-11-15, Czech Rep 1-2 South Korea 2016-06-05, Canada 3-1 Switzerland 2002-05-15, Mexico-South Africa 1-1 2010 WC, Mexico 2-2 South Korea 2025-09-09) - all matched.
CZE = Czech Republic/Czechia only (post-1993). Matches played as Czechoslovakia are excluded (e.g. Mexico met Czechoslovakia at the 1962 World Cup); hence MEX-CZE and RSA-CZE lists look short.

TUR is recorded as 'Turkey' in the source; GER includes the West Germany era; CUW record in the source includes the Netherlands Antilles era (back to 1924) and still shows zero meetings with GER, CIV and ECU.
Scores are full-time / after extra time; penalty shootouts ignored. Tournament labels taken from the source (e.g. 'Kirin Cup' and 'USA Cup' are friendly tournaments).
Pairs with empty 'matches' (RSA-KOR, CAN-BIH, MAR-HAI, HAI-SCO, PAR-TUR, GER-CUW, CUW-CIV, CUW-ECU, CIV-ECU) have no recorded senior men's A-international meeting ever.
11v11.com and worldfootball.net were unreachable from this environment (HTTP 403), so the GitHub dataset plus web-search verification was used instead.
19 of 36 pairs have no recorded meeting
